title: Saudian Deodeok Stew
description: A hearty stew originating from the Saudi region, featuring the unique flavor of deodeok. This dish is perfect for a cold day.

ingredients.name: Deodeok
ingredients.notes: Make sure to peel and chop the deodeok before use

ingredients.name: Radiant
ingredients.notes: Radiant can be used as a garnish or mixed with the deodeok for extra flavor

ingredients.name: Soup
ingredients.notes: Use a clear broth as the base for the stew

instructions: Heat a large pot over medium heat
Add the chopped deodeok and sauté until tender
Add the chopped radiant and stir well
Pour in the clear broth and bring to a boil
Reduce heat and let simmer for 20 minutes
Season with salt and pepper to taste
Serve hot, garnished with additional radiant if desired
